title: 【賣港】民主黨接受外媒訪問，話香港人只求獨立調查。

replies.msg:
]

主持人：How do you see this 6 month long standoff resolving?

劉慧卿：
We are not asking for a revolution or independence. We just want an independent comission of inquiry set up to investigate the whole saga. What's wrong with that!?

SOURCE：
https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2019-11-18/hk-government-has-to-respond-to-the-people-fmr-democratic-party-chairperson-lau-video
